title: Unite Royale
message: Latest version: 0.4.2 A big update that includes new content and balance adjustments New content - Added a new gamemode: Unite Royale In this gamemode 4 players face each others in a Free for all match, where the player with the most KOs wins - Updated the shader for trainer clothes to be closer to the original - Added Regirock and Regice to Theia Sky Ruins - Added a trainer card mode to the Photo Editor Balance changes - Cresselia Aurora Beam: Cooldown reduced: 6.5s -> 5.5s Damage Increased Lunar Blessing: Cooldown reduced: 11.5s -> 9.5s Shield activation time reduced: 5s -> 3.5s Moonblast: Cooldown reduced: 9s -> 7.5s Damage Increased Psybeam: Damage Increased Unite Move: Damage Increased - Marshadow Close Combat: Damage Increased Drain Punch: Duration of the animation reduced: 1.3s -> 1s Damage Increased Phantom Force: Damage Increased Shadow Sneak: Generic Change Spectral Thief: Damage Increased - Meowstic (Male) Basic Attack: Damage Increased Leer: Duration of the animation reduced: 1s -> 0.6s Psychic: Duration of the animation reduced: 0.6s -> 0.5s Reflect: Duration of the animation reduced: 0.6s -> 0.5s Scratch: Damage Increased Duration of the animation reduced: 1s -> 0.6s Wonder Room: Duration of the animation reduced: 1s -> 0.75s Bug Fixes - Fixed a bug where if a player died while being stunned it would remain stunned forever - Fixed a bug where Marshadow couldn't go through walls while using Shadow Sneak - Fixed a bug where players could very easily go out of bounds - Various other bug fixes On certain platforms the player clothes may take more time to load. Thank you for downloading this game, welcome to the my unite recreation! As this is an early build bugs are expected and 100% going to happen, if you find any please report them in my discord server (link in the itch page) Currently not every feature from the original is implemented, here's a list of features that are missing and planned to be added: - Some moves on certain pokemons - More settings options - Other things i may have missed But why should you play this? Idk at least you can't get slowbro united here. Jokes aside this is mainly so my concepts can actually be played. If quick join isn't finding any match it's likely that there are no open rooms at the moment, in that case i suggest you create an open room yourself. Lastly i hope you enjoy the experience and have some fun! Made with passion by JustMarcy (Of course the original game is owned by Timi studios, this project was purely made for educational purposes and does not intend to replace in any way the original)
